# FEP-0022 reachability exempt list (Phase 2).
#
# One service key per line, format:  module:QualName
# Blank lines and '#' comments (whole-line or trailing) are ignored.
#
# List ONLY legitimately-conditional registrations — types that are registered
# but intentionally resolved on a rare / conditional path (lazy protocols,
# plugin/registry extension points, settings resolved on demand). Everything
# here is human-curated with a stated reason; the list only ever GROWS
# (ratcheting — removing an entry re-exposes it to the gate).
#
# Seed this from the triage of the first full trajectory corpus run
# (FEP-0022 Phase 2). The spike in FEP-0021 found ~111 legitimately-unresolved
# registrations (47 *Settings, 50 *Protocol, 13 conditional) — those land here.
#
# Example (uncomment a real entry to exempt it):
# victor.some.module:SomeLazyProtocol   # lazy service interface; resolved only when a vertical opts in
